goal: Implement the FileEasy upload page flow for login, multi-file upload, progress visibility, resume status feedback, and error messaging using the approved visual and wireframe specs.
nonGoals: Do not implement backend storage logic beyond required integration calls.
Do not build the full admin page.
Do not add monitoring or advanced dashboard content.

acceptanceChecks.text: When a user scans the QR code and opens the upload page, they should see the page before authentication and then complete password validation before uploading.
When one or more files are uploading, the page should show per-file progress, resumable status, and actionable error feedback.
Visually confirm that the upload page matches the approved FileEasy visual and wireframe guidance and does not look like the legacy Xplay admin UI.

publishPolicy.commitMessage: FE-T004: FileEasy upload page web flow
publishPolicy.prTitle: FE-T004: FileEasy upload page web flow

handoffQuestions: List only UI or interaction ambiguities that require PM or design decisions.
